title: MacIdeas v.1.0 September Update!
description: With the introduction of the awesome Drawings tab, MacIdeas version 1.0 is oficially available with all the major tabs to help you boost your productivity even more than before!!! Other than the new Drawings tab, we also have a couple minor changes and tweaks this update:

mainarticles.p1: Sure, you can use Notes to jot down your ideas or use Tasks to manage your tasks, and use Lists to list out items. But what's better than drawing something out and visualizing it? Or to create something? Or to imagine something? The new Drawings tab is here, and it gives you infinite possibilities. You can use it however you want, to learn, to make, or to just draw for fun! You can switch colors, adjust brush size, and more. Even better, a lot of features are coming in the future for you to use it like a whiteboard or create a mindmap to plan for something. You can do anything with the new Drawings tab 🖌️!
mainarticles.p2: Because we believe in quality over quantity, we're focusing on fewer individual apps with many features rather than making a bunch of apps with less quality. That's why we decided to merge the Drawings tab with the originally planned Boards tab. The Boards tab was planned to be an interactive whiteboard and mindmap maker, but we figured that's very similar to what we planned for the Drawings tab. To make MacIdeas more effective and not confusing, we're integrating all the features we planned for Boards to the Drawings tab in the future, so stay tuned 🔥!

others.other1: Updated homepage with links for the MacIdeas tabs.
